title: Wyper Keeps Fighting
description: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Enel, Nami, Aisa. The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: Death is the most terrifying thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Men beg when they are terrified.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: How can he be SEO strong!? @000,000

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I added some to my shooter,

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: And it's draining your devil fruit powers.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: Shut up!! I'll be happy to die

summary: The Straw Hats and their allies try to survive Enel’s destruction while searching for a way to reach him.
